decision_impact: Promotion must be blocked unless mandatory governance, evidence, routing, tracking, receipt/handoff, and export proof gates are present and tested.

sources.claim: NIST AI RMF is a framework for managing AI risks and supports lifecycle governance.
OWASP Agentic AI guidance treats agentic planning, tools, memory and orchestration as explicit threat surfaces.
Recent NIST implementation commentary reiterates Govern/Map/Measure/Manage lifecycle governance.
